programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the world-leading Royal Marsden Hospital, as surgeons attempt pioneering cancer treatments, including a high-risk bid to save a womans voice box.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The crew of Essex and Herts Air Ambulance race to help teenager Jack who has a major brain injury after colliding with a car in Hemel Hempstead.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at `Whod a Thought It in Grafty Green, Kent, where Joe Mallett and her partner Alex Rea Baldwin hope to kick off the week in style.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool, where owner Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family-friendly BandB.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, North Wales, where BandB newbies, Jackie and Paul Langshaw, hope to show off a little of their sparkle.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit of the week is to Llandrindod Wells in mid-Wales, where at the Great Trewern BandB husband and wife Liz and Brian Jardine enjoy the quiet life in their own personal piece of paradise.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of `Whod a Thought It, `The New Osborne Hotel, and the `Fairy Falls Hotel meet for the final time to find out what theyve been paid.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Sawcliffe Manor in High Risby, Lincolnshire, where hosts Emily and Jana are convinced their stylish decor and rural setting will give them the edge. But their chances of hosting a flawless visit last all of two seconds.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Charlotte and Donna host the weeks second visit at Rooms at the Inn in Nottinghamshire. A visit to a recreation of a Native American camp shakes things up, and one BandBer spends the afternoon bragging about the merits of their own establishment.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three takes the BandBers to Stanton-on-the-Wolds in Nottinghamshire, where Rob runs Wolds Wine Estate. Hes certain that the idyllic location of his glamping pods in the middle of a vineyard will provide a corking experience for his guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Karlie hosts the weeks final visit, at Dovestone Holiday Park in Saddleworth, Greater Manchester. Things get off to a sizzling start with the BandBers heralding the hot tubs, but not everyone is onboard with a group meditation session.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Bust-ups about breakfast options, ding-dongs over decor, and grumblings about gravy-scented wine. Its a unique payment day, with the BandBers meeting up for one last time to debate their differences and find out how much theyve been paid.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole meet Gaby, whose garden is strewn with interesting items. Henry finds a vintage sack barrow while Simon unearths a shepherds stove in the undergrowth.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In north Wales, Simon OBrien and Henry Cole meet Anne and her grandson Tom. Simon unearths an art deco fire guard and must decide what hell do with it.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to Suffolk and Constable Country, where Henry finds a miniature Hay Wain to lovingly restore.

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: An unforgettable voyage to the worlds most awe-inspiring destinations. From Alaskas glacial ice fields to Japan and the sun-drenched Sicilian port of Messina, we see what cruise ship life is really like.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Corfu holds a special place in Lisa and Waynes hearts, as its where they just got married. Can Laura Hamilton find them the perfect holiday home in Kassiopi for their £130k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Liz has long-dreamt of owning a holiday home in her favourite part of Catalonia - Sitges. Will any of Jasmine Harmans options for her £180k impress her enough to make an offer?

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Its a rollercoaster of emotions as dog behaviour specialist Sue pulls out all the stops to help beloved long-term resident Lady, the Staffie cross, finally find a home, after a year of searching.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: A recently widowed man and his two teenage daughters travel to a game reserve in South Africa. However, their journey of healing soon turns into a fight for survival when a bloodthirsty lion starts to stalk them.

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun
programme.desc: At the age of 70, Forrest Tucker makes an audacious escape from San Quentin, conducting an unprecedented string of heists that confound authorities and enchant the public.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best loved famous faces share their sharp, insightful, funny and emotional views on popular and topical TV shows. From Saturday night entertainment juggernauts to the weeks biggest news stories, celebs become opinionated viewers.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Luke, whos lost his dating mojo, is raring to reinvigorate his love life and find a lady to relight his fire. And can pole dancer Abi find someone to send her heart into a spin?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: While preparing for a gruelling trip from Perth to Darwin, Steve faces a malfunctioning clutch. Plus, Robbie and his crew embark on a challenging trip moving a timber house.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo face ongoing mechanical problems as their fully loaded road-trains engine fails. Plus, breakdowns and engine problems push Steve behind schedule in the outback.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark is under pressure to deliver a fragile electrical control room to a remote mine deep in the outback. Plus, Jeff is confronted with a heavy storm while on the road in Tasmania.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Road flooding means Mark and his crew must work against the clock to deliver a fragile load to a remote gold mine. And, Jeff faces a treacherous pass in wet conditions.

programme.title: The Scalphunters
programme.desc: When a man returns to civilisation after a year of fur trapping in the Rocky Mountains, hes stopped by some fearsome Kiowa Indians and compelled to trade his valuable pelts for a runaway slave. programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Police race to intercept three men suspected of robbing a string of plumbers merchants. A fleeing van speeds the wrong way round a major roundabout and causes a huge crash. Police investigate illegally customised motors in Basildon.

programme.desc: We are back on the roads with Cheshire Polices elite team of motorway cops. Storms bring travel chaos to the roads and PC Mike responds to a call for urgent backup on the night shift.

programme.desc: Jamie and his crew relive some of the best and worst moments. Despite the injuries and the arguments, they reveal why they stick it out.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder must find a way to capture an alien bounty hunter who has been murdering doctors and has kidnapped Scully.

programme.title: Scam City
programme.desc: The French capital may be the city of art, style and romance, but theres a seamy underside that tourists seldom see. Conor Woodman investigates.

programme.desc: With Joey in his new apartment, Chandler gets a troublesome new flatmate, Eddie. Meanwhile, Phoebe makes a video for `Smelly Cat, and Ross and Monica find it nearly impossible to live together.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is broke and decides to gamble on the stock market, and Chandler and Ross run into a couple of bullies in Central Park. Meanwhile, Rachel and Joey help Phoebe locate her father, but a vicious dog prevents Phoebe from finally meeting him. After accidentally injuring the dog with her car, Phoebe gets to know her fathers second wife whom she never knew about, and another long-lost family member.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica decides to hold a surprise birthday for Rachel, but everything goes wrong when Rachels estranged parents turn up unexpectedly. The party then splits into two factions: a dreary gathering in Monicas apartment, and a college-style drunken party at Chandler and Joeys flat.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Chicken Pox
programme.desc: Phoebes submariner boyfriend visits New York on leave from the Navy. Unfortunately, Phoebe catches chicken pox at baby Bens first birthday party. Meanwhile, when Monica realises that Richard has no real neuroses, she worries that she is too strange for him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Barry and Mindys Wedding
programme.desc: When Rachel serves as a bridesmaid at the wedding of her ex-fiance Barry and her friend Mindy, she relives the nightmare of her own failed wedding day. Meanwhile, Chandler becomes enamoured with a woman he meets on the internet, but is surprised when he finally meets her.

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Martin, Glenn and Connor target an astonishing fly-tip of 40 tons of waste, dumped on a beauty spot near a derelict grand hall in the Midlands.

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Chris takes on some elusive mice causing havoc in an unexpected location. In Buckinghamshire, a lorry load of potentially hazardous waste has been dumped by the side of a main road.

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Chloe is taken under the wing of enforcers Ian and Anneil as they conduct a street sweep in the London Borough of Hounslow. In Haringey, grime fighters in the borough use more than a hundred cameras to monitor their eleven square mile patch.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The traffic cops clamp down on young drivers causing danger on north Yorkshires roads. In the Yorkshire Dales, the traffic cops hunt down a young man believed to be drug driving and whos failed to stop in a suspected stolen car.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A prolific car thief, with a string of convictions, crashes and rolls a stolen car at over 100mph. In Harrogate, the hunt for a disqualified driver leads to a high-speed car chase.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Near York, a young driver in a stolen car is on a suspected high behind the wheel. The police must make a move before the reckless man can join a busy motorway and cause more mayhem.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Drink-driving, drug use and atrocious weather all contribute to trouble for the traffic police as they investigate cases including a driver who is spotted taking drugs whilst behind the wheel of a car transporter.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The interceptors are in pursuit of a road works wrecker, a 17-year-old robbery suspect, and a drink driver who does not understand the word `blow. Dan is forced into a daylight pursuit of a Ford Focus with a shocking outcome.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Eight police cars and the eye in the sky hunt down a high powered Porsche Cayenne that is causing carnage. Undertaking at high speeds and goading the interceptors, the driver even manages to take out several police cars.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Pursued by a helicopter and a team of armed response vehicles, two men armed with machetes and a sawn-off shotgun make a dramatic escape on a motorbike. Dog handler Duncan joins the firearms squad to close the area and help hunt the villains.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A suspect assaults Steve with his car keys, Charlie and Paul pursue a Corsa that stole fuel, and Chris and Sophie spot a bunny-hopping learner driver who already has eight points on his provisional license.

programme.title: Surgeons: A Matter of Life or Death
programme.desc: This ground-breaking new series tells the stories of remarkable life-saving operations at one of Britains biggest hospitals, filmed close up with extraordinary stories of surgical skill.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.sub-title: Violent Gunman or Brain Trauma Victim?
programme.desc: A man wakes up handcuffed in hospital, half-blind from a gunshot. He is accused of attacking his fiancee and neighbour. He struggles to remember the details of that fateful night. Was this violence or brain trauma?

programme.title: Phrogging: Hider in My House
programme.desc: When odd noises fill Courtney Randolphs home, her two exes offer to help; things become more chaotic; shes blind to whats happening; Davis Wahlman reports that he saw a woman jog out of his house; when the cops leave, he gets another surprise.

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: Bethany Vincent loved her family and her nine-year-old boy, DJ. Then an online relationship with Daniel Boulton quickly turns her and her sons life into a living hell.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Dr Emma meets a man with a strange looking lump on his arm. Theres an odd ear lump for Dr Magnus, exploding head cysts for Dr Adil and a large leg lump on a dance teacher for Dr Dev.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Wojcieches had an epileptic seizure at work. And too little recovery time between seizures could lead to permanent brain damage. Thomas has a ring stuck on his finger.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his lifeguard team rush to save Hobie, ex-wife Gayle and her fiance after their plane crashes in the water.

programme.desc: Romance prevails when Jackie tries to intensify her relationship with Mitch, Matt and Summer deal with their feelings for each other and Hobie falls in love.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After rekindling her relationship with a former love (John Allen Nelson), C.J. (Pamela Denise Anderson) discovers that he has a serious disease.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: C.J. is pursued by a persistent executive who tries to impress her with his hot-air ballooning skills; Slade returns unexpectedly.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is kidnapped by a woman who takes him to a fishing boat to treat her wounded husband, an escaped convict.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hostage Mitch performs surgery on an ex-con; an environmental investigator has a near-fatal accident.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch agonizes over the near-drowning of a boy who lies in a coma.

programme.desc: Mitchs upcoming birthday motivates him to enter an iron-man competition; Matts effectiveness as a lifeguard suffers when he takes a night job.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A murderer threatening to bring harm to some of the lifeguards; Mitch resorts to extraordinary means to bring an end to the situation peacefully.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The reunion of an elite group of lifeguards from the 1950s prompts Ben to make a decision about his future at Baywatch.

programme.desc: Mitch tries to save his brother, who suffers a heart attack after their sailboat capsizes; Summer sees a ghost while staying at a famous San Diego hotel.

programme.desc: Stephanie and C.J. search for Mitch and his brother, who are lost at sea; Summer does some research on the ghost that has been appearing to her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An attractive woman and her plain sister vie for Mitchs affections; Matt confronts his fear of sharks.

programme.desc: Mitch dates an investigative reporter whose story about an international government conspiracy has put her life in danger.

programme.desc: At a community-run growing project, Gregor picks up fresh parsnips. If you can do carrot cake, then why not parsnip cake? Mewn prosiect tyfu a redir gan y gymuned, mae Gregor MacLeòid yn casglu pannas ffres ar gyfer cacen.

programme.desc: Niall Iain Macdonald hosts the quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a strì airson duais airgid.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Utopia na Smal
programme.desc: The detailed events of April 26, 1986, when Chernobyl Unit 4 explodes. What begins as a routine safety test ends in the worlds first exposed nuclear reactor.

programme.title: Somhairle Spins
programme.desc: Tha slighe dùbhlanach aig Somhairle agus a bhràthair Innes air a chiad latha aca a rothaireachd eadar Inbhir Nis agus Glaschu air an Badger Divide.

programme.title: Seirm
programme.desc: Filmed during Celtic Connections 2025, Seirm showcases bespoke recordings and conversations with some of the best artists appearing at the festival. This episode features performances from Ciorstaidh Beaton, Eric Bibb, Loudon Wainwright III, Kíla and Joshua Burnside. In Gaelic with English subtitles.

programme.title: Belladrum
programme.desc: An còmhlan cliùiteach Albannach, Texas, a tilleadh gu Belladrum oidhche Shathairne. Iconic Scottish band Texas return to Belladrum to headline Saturday night.

programme.title: Binneas - Na Trads
programme.desc: Concert set performed by Marloch, originally recorded live at the 2024 Trad Awards in Inverness with An Tèid Thu Leam a Mhàiri amongst the songs and tunes.

programme.sub-title: A Night at the Bat Cave

programme.title: Creag nam Buthaidean
programme.desc: When Lala and Babas fluffy disintegrates, they must patiently await the growth of a new one.

programme.title: Boban is Fuigheag
programme.desc: Lorg Fuigheag rudeigin spòrsail son cluich leis - ach cò às a thàinig e? Fuigheag has found something thats fun to play with, but where did it come from?

programme.title: Meaban and Moo
programme.desc: Tha Linda a tadhal air Meaban is Moo gus dùbhlan a chur romhpa. An-diugh feumaidh rudan òir a lorg. Linda visits Meaban and Moo with a challenge. They must find gold items.

programme.title: Lon le Linda
programme.desc: Linda and her friends make tasty fishcakes.

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: Michael Hill reads `Na Trioblaidean aig Sioraf. The book was written by Jory John, illustrated by Lane Smith and translated into Gaelic by Morag Stewart.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an Ath-dhoras
programme.desc: Tha mòr-amharas ann nuair a tha an Rìgh a nochdadh gun a chrùn air aig ball-coise. Theres much suspicion when the King appears at football without his crown.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an Ath-dhoras
programme.desc: Tha Stella maslaichte mas fhaic a caraidean i aig picnic teaghlaich sa phàirc. Stella is embarrassed in case friends see her at a family picnic in the park.

programme.title: Bogaisean is Gumbalan
programme.desc: When the gumbles are struck with boggle twitches, Float is charged with gathering nettles to cure them, but soon finds herself lured in by Weather Snike to cook up a batch for the ailing snikes.

programme.title: An Doimhne
programme.desc: Nuair a tha Na Neachdan ann an Triantan Bhermuda, chan eil laghannan fiosaigs ag obrachadh mar bu chòir, tha iad steigte ann. When the Neachdan are in the Bermuda Triangle, the laws of physics dont seem to apply.

programme.title: Bus Ghlaschú
programme.desc: The story of the Glasgow bus, a lifeline between Donegal and the Scottish city.

programme.title: SpeakGaelic
programme.desc: Meet Gaelic learner Caroline Quinn from Trinidad and Tobago. Plus, Calum Maclean is in Portmahomack in Easter Ross to learn about his heritage.

programme.title: An La
programme.desc: Local, national and international news from BBC ALBA.

programme.title: Somhairle Spins
programme.desc: After a tough start, Somhairle and Innes continue riding the Badger Divide, where they encounter mechanical issues, torrential rain, shortcuts, wrong turns and lost baggage!

programme.title: An Clo Mor
programme.sub-title: Fuaim an Airgid - The Sound of Cash
programme.desc: After years of unhappiness, mill worker Mairead finally walks out of her decades long marriage and into the arms of the person she loves, hotel owner Cairistiona. However, as the women agree to wait for the right time to tell Maireads husband Boyd they are together, little do they know theres someone watching from the shadows.

programme.title: Alba fon Talamh
programme.desc: Calum starts his underground tour in the north-west of Scotland, exploring the incredible cave networks of Applecross.

programme.title: Samhradh air Sàl
programme.desc: Ruth MacKay goes fishing and talks about the impact fishing trips have had on her life on the island.

programme.title: Port
programme.desc: In this episode Julie Fowlis and Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh explore their musical roots in Dublin. Singer Darren MacLean and piper Carole-Anne MacKay join our musical hosts for a tour of several iconic venues.

programme.title: Fergie, The Ceilidh King
programme.desc: A dèanamh luaidh air am fear-ciùil Fergie Dòmhnallach à Loch Abar a chaochail na bu thràithe am-bliadhna.Tribute to Lochaber musician Fergie MacDonald who died this year.

programme.title: Seòid a Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programme.desc: Bracaistean falainn a th aig na seòid is Ruairidh le trioblaidean cridhe. The lads focus on healthy breakfasts after Roddys heart condition diagnosis.

programme.desc: With Nikolaus Pevsners "Buildings of England" in hand, Michael Bracewell explores the architecture of Surrey. Amongst the places he visits are Polesden Lacey and Whiteley Village.

programme.title: Inside Classical
programme.desc: The BBC Philharmonic Orchestra performs Bruchs `First Violin Concerto, with Jennifer Pike on violin, and Dvoraks `New World Symphony, a journey of musical discovery around America.

programme.title: Attenboroughs Passion Projects
programme.desc: First transmitted in 1989, `Lost Worlds, Vanished Lives showcases the worlds major fossil sites. In a number of specially shot interviews, Attenborough introduces extracts from the series, where he reveals ancient sea creatures, sabre-toothed predators and immense dinosaurs. Ground-breaking for its time and still as relevant now, David explores how fossils fire the imagination and teach us about the lives of long extinct animals, and also the world they lived in.

programme.title: Darcey Bussell on The Magic of Dance
programme.desc: Renowned ballet dancer Dame Darcey Bussell introduces us to a gem from the BBCs dance archives, The Magic of Dance, which was first transmitted in 1979 to great acclaim and is presented by celebrated ballet dancer, the unforgettable Margot Fonteyn. Darcey describes her favourite moments of the series, including a tap masterclass with the ever cool Sammy Davis Jr, a beautiful routine by the celebrated Latvian dancer Mikhail Baryshnikov and a glimpse of the pioneer of modern dance Isadora Duncan.

programme.title: Sammy Davis Jr at the BBC
programme.desc: He was known as Mr Entertainment, and its clear why that was the case from this collection of some of Sammy Davis Jrs finest moments on British television - showing off his unbeatable talents as singer and raconteur and opening up about his life in several fascinating conversations.

programme.title: Genius of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes travels to China on the trail of Confucius, a great sage of Chinese history whose ideas have fundamentally shaped the country of his birth for around 2,500 years.

programme.title: EastEnders

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The Mitchells try to get through to Phil, Cindy and Max have a close call, and the Slaters surprise Big Mo.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Phils search continues, two Walford residents face a race against time, and Nigel receives some visitors.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Albert Square comes together to celebrate a friend, Phil battles his inner demons, and Max and Cindys romance causes friction.

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: This powerful documentary follows pop star Leigh-Anne Pinnock as she confronts her experience as the only black member of Little Mix, and as a black woman in the music industry. Leigh-Anne talks about the racism she experienced growing up. Both her parents are of Caribbean heritage, and Leigh-Anne identifies as black. She is also aware that having lighter skin and being a celebrity means she is in a more privileged position than others.

programme.title: The Woman in Black
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Tian Eleri investigates the story of Scottish medium Helen Duncan, who in 1944 became the last person convicted and imprisoned under the Witchcraft Act. As the Blitz rained down on London, Helen went on trail at the Old Bailey.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Theres an unnerving breakthrough in Sians investigation into a woman who claimed to summon spirits of the dead when she finds an audio recording of a Helen Duncan seance. Not only is a gravelly male spirit heard to speak, but the people gathered comment that they see and recognise him. How is this possible? Sian tests out different theories - was it someone else speaking?

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.sub-title: Britains Last Witch: Bringing Back the Dead
programme.desc: Theres only a handful of mediums worldwide who claim to do anything close to what Helen Duncan said she could and physically manifest spirits into a room. For Sian, the only way to fully understand what was happening at Helens seances is to witness this for herself, so she tracks one of these rare mediums down in the Netherlands. Sian arrives at the Dutch monastery and is greeted by a host who takes Sian on a private tour of the seance room, where the medium will work that evening.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.sub-title: Britains Last Witch: The Final Seance
programme.desc: Sians mission to get to the truth behind Helen Duncans apparently supernatural abilities draws to a close - but a secret package sent from Helens granddaughter in America leaves Sian with what appears to be the smoking gun she has been waiting for. The package contains what seems to be unexplainable proof that a spirit revealed the sinking of a second warship during one of Helens seances.

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: This powerful documentary follows pop star Leigh-Anne Pinnock as she confronts her experience as the only black member of Little Mix, and as a black woman in the music industry. Leigh-Anne talks about the racism she experienced growing up. Both her parents are of Caribbean heritage, and Leigh-Anne identifies as black. She is also aware that having lighter skin and being a celebrity means she is in a more privileged position than others.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Clara is alone in Victorian London with a man she doesnt know, a dinosaur in the Thames, and a spate of deadly spontaneous combustions. The Doctor has changed. Its time you knew him.

programme.title: Andi Olivers Fabulous Feasts

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin is at the Watts Gallery in the heart of the Surrey countryside with experts David Harper and Thomas Plant. David uncovers a collection of British film and TV memorabilia and Thomas is thrilled by some French cameo glass. Also, Paul Martin is on the trail of martians in Woking: the setting for HG Wellss sci-fi novel `The War Of The Worlds.

Two British soldiers receive seemingly impossible orders during World War I. In a race against time, they must cross into enemy territory to deliver a message that could potentially save 1,600 of their fellow comrades -- including ones own brother.

programme.title: Here We Are
programme.desc: Aharon has devoted his life to raising his son Uri. They live together in a gentle routine, away from the real world. But Uri is autistic, and now as a young adult it might be time for him to live in a specialized home. While on their way to the institution, Aharon decides to run away with his son and hits the road, knowing that Uri is not ready for this separation. Or is it, in fact, his father who is not ready?

programme.desc: Ivy is on the warpath in Lancaster, doing his best to intimidate the other buyers, and he wont be losing any sleep over it; Brandi begrudgingly lets Bozek decide which locker they buy; Dusty goes up against the King to prove a point.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry utilises a little-known tactic to snatch up a locker, and it ties him up in knots; Brandi shops in the bargain basement, but puts on quite a show in the process; Ivy lands a large unit and the tools stack right up.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Two for the Price of Dust
programme.desc: The big guns come out in Riverside, but Rene isnt having any of it; Darrell presses his luck with a smaller locker and makes a neat profit; Dusty finds that once he gets going, its hard to stop... so he just keeps re-loading.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Its a Safe Time to Get Lit!
programme.desc: Lisa heads to Huntington Beach; Darrell spends the right amount of time going through his locker; Kenny rides a recent string of luck right into his unit, while Rene puts his bankroll up against a pair of safes.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: All Hail, King Brandi: The Rule-her of West Covina
programme.desc: In West Covina, Brandi makes a serious land grab and it pays off handsomely. Rene cant resist the mystery of a good safe. Kenny cant seem to satisfy his hunger, while Barry takes an opportunity to poach from the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene goes big; Ivy scores a packed locker and stumbles across an antique of unusual origin; Darrell grabs a smaller unit but finds that good things do, indeed, come in petite packages sometimes.

programme.title: Beyond Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Andy and Paul meet with the Skinwalker team to review the most compelling evidence uncovered in Phase 2 of the investigation Beyond Skinwalker Ranch--from amazing UAP sightings, to evidence of portals, to terrifying encounters with unknown entities.

programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: When a stunning UAP appears above Skinwalker Walker Ranch during an experiment involving hundreds of illuminated drones, the timing of what happens next leaves the team in disbelief.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up; we uncover explosive science kits, high-flying kite tubes and more.

programme.title: Witches of Salem
programme.desc: The number of accused individuals keeps growing, hinting at a greater conspiracy of witches; the examinations take place in a packed meetinghouse, where suspects face harsh questioning, and a mob of young women shout accusations of witchcraft.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: One of historys most notorious pirates, Blackbeard, is said to have had a treasure worth millions of dollars. After centuries of searching, the legendary hoard remains missing.

programme.desc: A look at what the odd, worm-like object seen in the sky in a video Tweeted by a Proof viewer is.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Spontaneous Human Combustion, the Tell-Tale Hum, and UFO Explosion
programme.desc: Are the photos taken in 1951 proof that a woman in St. Petersburg, Florida spontaneously combusted? What is the brain-numbing noise plaguing Brooklyn residents? Tony Harris and his team of experts delve into these claims to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Swamp Beast Sighting, Martian Conspiracy, and Transparent Mexican Sea Monster
programme.desc: Did a canoer capture footage of the legendary Bigfoot-like Skunk Ape? What is the mysterious, transparent creature dubbed the `Sea Monster recently discovered in Mexico? Tony Harris and his team delve into these claims to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In Norwich, the UKs most Tudor city, Professor Alice Roberts learns about religious intolerance, uncovers the Norwich FC canarys origins and experiences humiliating Tudor justice.

programme.desc: Happy notices a tiny fruit fly on his apple and the Squirrels are amazed by how small it is. The fly reveals there are many things even smaller than him and Duggee teaches them that some things are so small that you cant even see them, like atoms.

programme.desc: Its bathtime! The Ducklings are determined Weasy will get clean.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Team Spidey have to stop Gobby from taking control of all the vehicles in the city. The gang works together to help a group of tortoises by defeating Sandmans giant sand castle.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea - and onto land. With new rides and new friends, they are prepared to protect any habitats and animals at risk on land or under the water.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley poses for a portrait for the town art class, but he still has other jobs to do. How will he ever stay still long enough so everyone can finish their artwork?

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Chilli decides to become a superhero called Super Chilli. His superhero skills are put to the test when Evil Pea covers Supertato in sticky honey, but Chillis heat saves the day.

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programme.desc: The Heroes meet a mysterious person while on the hunt for a stolen statue.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.sub-title: I Love to Dance the Flamenco
programme.desc: Dance along with the gang as they visit Spain for a flamenco dancing fiesta.

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Rebecca and Murphy are trying to come up with a new move to perfect their competition dance routine. They take a break for an ice-cold monster shake and find time to create a bottle penguin. The Mini Monsters demonstrate how to make everlasting sandcastles, and Rebeccas aunt calls from space - where she has made some alien friends. The Recycling Express arrives with empty tissue boxes, inspiring a mega monster make - a funny pineapple puppet.

programme.title: Big Cook Little Cook
programme.desc: The chefs are getting ready for a wedding, and Jen is wearing her prized hat. Sunny Sun comes to visit, Small flies off to see how ketchup is made, and the two chefs cook a sweet and sour hat for their beaming guest.

programme.title: Lets Go for a Walk
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers walk to the meadow to play a game of rounders. On the way they race boats on the river, count the ducks, find some leaves and even see a crocodile.

programme.title: Balamory
programme.desc: Avas solar gadgets malfunction, making her doubt her skills. But with PC Plums encouragement, she realises that each invention needs a different-sized solar panel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Its lovely and warm - just right for a day on the beach. The squirrels learn how to make sandcastles - dig, dig, dig! They are doing such a good job that Jon and Nigel ask the crabs if the squirrels could work together to build them a new home. They create the most spectacular giant sandcastle ever seen, with shells, seaweed, great views and lots of sand.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Only Peso can save the day when a cone snail invades the Octopod and picks off the crew one by one with its dangerous harpoons.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Tidbit is very serious about using sunscreen and even asks Vida to apply it to his shell. But when he gets distracted while having fun in the sun, a sunburn appears and he needs Vidas help again.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: How will the Go Jetters retrieve Xulis `Academy Ace flying trophy from Caernarfon Castle?

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafi wishes she could see a real dinosaur. Slurpy appears, causing chaos in the museum.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: A famous soul singer is coming to perform in the garden, but no one knows what they look like. Meanwhile, a cheeky little mouse with a great big voice has appeared in the sun house.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, its Chicory running the show backstage and singing about how she, the Belgian Endive, was discovered in the song `Chicory, Dickory, Dock.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friends enjoy a day exploring the forest, whilst Mr Tumble goes on a nature hunt with Tumble Ted.

programme.title: The Toddler Club at Home
programme.desc: Nigel, Benjee Bear and Bailee Bear welcome toddlers Joshua, Inam, Liyana, Maisy, Francis and Arabella, and their grown-ups, to the Toddler Club. Parents, carers and their little ones at home are invited to join in with all the fun activities too. The Whats in the Box? game reveals a pair of stripy socks, and when the toddlers and parents open up a bigger box, they discover lots more objects and toys that are inspired by patterns. This theme is explored through play, song and story.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Moas chick is reluctant to emerge from her egg, so Kiri sings an encouraging song.

programme.title: Piggy Builders
programme.desc: The Piggies wonder whats more fun: playing outside or a board game. So, Charlie builds a giant outdoor board game, but their competitiveness ruins the fun!

programme.title: Our Family
programme.sub-title: Iona and Elba: Elbas Birthday Party
programme.desc: Its Elbas birthday and sister Iona is planning a very special tea party for her. Iona and Elba decorate the bedroom ready for the big party, and there are lots of balloons and games to enjoy.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley poses for a portrait for the town art class, but he still has other jobs to do. How will he ever stay still long enough so everyone can finish their artwork?

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers land on a forested planet and learn a game called impish ball. But before they can play, they must help the locals build a nest while distracting a mischievous beaverling.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger the Tricarrotops explores the world of the crunchiest era, going on adventures throughout the colourful Vegesaur Valley.

programme.title: Waffles After School Club
programme.desc: Mrs Hobbs challenges the After Schoolers to vote for their favourite activity, and to do it again on the arrival of Mr Brooklyn-Bell.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Its Novah and Nellys turn to accompany Aaron on a unique garden adventure. Today, the team will need to be all ears as they take in the sounds their city centre plot has to share.

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programme.desc: Tom likes to do big things but struggles when Professor Kranium shrinks him with her ray.

programme.title: Ranger Hamzas Eco Quest
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers learn why rock piles are an important place for lots of creatures. They gather rocks and build their own rock city for insects and minibeasts.

programme.title: Andys Dino Island
programme.desc: Andy and Jen embark on an epic adventure to discover what the dinosaurs of Dino Island get up to at night. When he gets lost in the dark, Andy is helped by a velociraptor.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato and Chilli are playing a computer game when Evil Pea takes it for herself.

programme.title: Magic Hands
programme.desc: Bobbles and friends play games, run amok and feast on a delicious picnic in the forest whilst Aimee and Mia perform `The Teddy Bears Picnic.

programme.title: Nick Copes Popcast
programme.desc: Its curry night and Nick writes a song to help him remember to buy lots of healthy ingredients, but will he remember to buy Normans dog treats?

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Fergies wheelchair breaks from doing an awesome trick, Vida asks Grandpa Beaver to make her a new one so that she can get even better and do more tricks.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When Cosima wrongly accuses Big Lizard of eating Dads birthday cake, he vanishes. He either ran away, or is planning a special surprise to save the day.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafi, Ruby and Finn struggle to score in basketball, so Rafi wishes for a magic ball. At first, its fun, as every shot goes in - even trick throws. But the constant winning becomes boring, and the ball bounces endlessly into the hoop by itself. The trio try to contain it, but it escapes again and again. Finally, they return to playing with the ordinary ball, and Finn sinks a real shot, proving true victory is earned.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna cant find a way to make herself useful. Theyre both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: JoJo and Gran Gran

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck give Moon painting lessons after being inspired by a trip to the art gallery.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Lola and Lotta are best friends and do everything together, but then a new girl arrives at school and Lotta seems rather taken with her. Inconsolable that Lotta may not like her anymore, Charlie and Marv come to the rescue, and Lola realises that of course Lotta is still definitely her best friend.

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Inside the little toy house, the friends discover the rhyme Old King Cole in the nursery rhyme book. When Mr Onion wishes he could be a merry king like Old King Cole, they all have to work together to make Old King Onion the merriest king of all.

programme.title: Beddybyes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa find a moth and learn about nocturnal life.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: After waking Upsy Daisy, Igglepiggle goes with her for a walk in the garden. Upsy Daisys bed decides to follow them even when they ride on the Ninky Nonk. When Upsy Daisy decides she would like a rest, her bed makes her chase after it.

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.desc: Doug gets excited at the prospect of finally getting his father-in-law to move out when he discovers that Arthur and his half-brother have inherited a house nearby.

programme.desc: When Carrie agrees to Arthurs choices for what to eat for dinner and which movie to rent, Doug gets upset that he doesnt get his way. Meanwhile, Spence camps out for days outside a cinema.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ray agrees to go back to church, he soon discovers why Frank is happy to go every week.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Debra discovers that Ray taped over their wedding video with the SuperBowl, he must go to extreme lengths to make it up to her.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and her new neighbour have a girls night out and end up on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: The Simpsons

He decides not to quit when he finds out they get to use pocketknives, and sets off to camp, with the embarrassing - and dangerous - Homer in tow.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Tay House in Perth and Kinross, where the BandBers arent too happy about a lack of TVs. And theres something fishy going on at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Aberlour Hotel in Moray, where the BandBers are in good spirits at a distillery. But theres a hangover at feedback time.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three is to Cobblehouse Country Cabins in Aberdeenshire. Graham and Emma hope the BandBers will be wowed by their wood. Will everyone be left pining for more?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Trinity Boutique BandB in Peterhead in Aberdeenshire. Host Yuliya treats her guests to an afternoon in a prison, before wowing her guests with a breakfast thats considerably more substantial than porridge.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its payment day, and the holiday hosts meet for one last time to find out how much theyve been paid and settle some scores. After cutting questions, cleanliness concerns and a Moroccan mismatch, the BandBers find out whos won the week.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Liz has long-dreamt of owning a holiday home in her favourite part of Catalonia - Sitges. Will any of Jasmine Harmans options for her £180k impress her enough to make an offer?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse go on an all-syrup squishee bender, after which Bart awakes with a massive hangover and the memory of embarrassing himself by joining the junior campers. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Tay House in Perth and Kinross, where the BandBers arent too happy about a lack of TVs. And theres something fishy going on at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Aberlour Hotel in Moray, where the BandBers are in good spirits at a distillery. But theres a hangover at feedback time.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three is to Cobblehouse Country Cabins in Aberdeenshire. Graham and Emma hope the BandBers will be wowed by their wood. Will everyone be left pining for more?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Trinity Boutique BandB in Peterhead in Aberdeenshire. Host Yuliya treats her guests to an afternoon in a prison, before wowing her guests with a breakfast thats considerably more substantial than porridge.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its payment day, and the holiday hosts meet for one last time to find out how much theyve been paid and settle some scores. After cutting questions, cleanliness concerns and a Moroccan mismatch, the BandBers find out whos won the week.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Up All Night
programme.desc: During their fist night together, Rachel and Tag realise they forgot to ship out an important package at the office.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes new job as a telemarketer gets off to a tricky start when the first person she calls, an office worker called Earl, tells her he feels unappreciated and wants to kill himself. Phoebe keeps him on the telephone, trying to persuade him otherwise and finally takes the desperate measure of going to his office to convince him to stay alive.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: Celebrating Rachels 30th birthday inspires the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays. Joey got angry with God for breaking their deal, Ross bought himself a sports car in an attempt to recapture his youth, and Monica got blind drunk and embarrassed herself at her surprise party.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Hoping to win a huge jackpot, the friends pool their money and buy dozens of lottery tickets, but they argue over how to spend the fortune if they win, and Monica irritates everyone else by buying tickets just for her and Chandler. Exasperated, Phoebe takes the bowl of everyones tickets and threatens to throw it off the balcony. The others make up, but a pigeon startles Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Disappointed to learn that they cannot conceive a baby naturally, Monica and Chandler consider their options. When Chandler invites a handsome colleague round for dinner, Monica and Chandler embarrassingly interview him as a potential sperm donor. Meanwhile, while shopping with Phoebe, Rachel admits that she still has a thing for Joey.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: While the friends are still in Barbados, Joey tries to tell Ross about his feelings for Rachel and Ross wants to confess to kissing Joeys girlfriend Charlie, but it is easier said than done. Meanwhile, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe can hear their amorous conversations through the hotels paper-thin walls. Also, Monicas hair problems go from bad to worse, and Phoebe has some bad news for Mikes girlfriend on her birthday.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: Ross drinks too much wine while dining with Rachel, Joey and Charlie. Elsewhere, Frank Jr cannot cope with his precocious triplets and pays Phoebe a visit.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel gets Monica and Chandler to delay their long-awaited trip to Vermont for Emmas first birthday bash, but problems ensue when Emma falls asleep and a racy cake turns up.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachels Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel regrets trusting her self-indulgent little sister Amy with Emma, Monica regrets asking Joey to write a recommendation letter to the child adoption agency for her, and Phoebe accidentally thwarts the anniversary surprise Mike has in store for her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross applies for a palaeontology grant, but discovers that Dr Hobart - who allocates such funding - used to go out with his girlfriend Charlie. Meanwhile, Mike wants Phoebe to get rid of one of her bizarre paintings, but neither Rachel nor Monica is keen to take it, and Chandler lies to Joey about watching his audition tape.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a childrens charity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but locks everyone out when they turn up late as Joey and Ross went to a hockey game while Rachel and Phoebe took Emma to a baby beauty contest. Monica also receives some adoption news.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler are forced to pretend to be a reverend and a doctor when their prospective childs birth mother gets the wrong end of the stick. Meanwhile, Joeys date with Phoebes friend doesnt go well, and Ross is left with an inappropriate outfit for a date with a sexy salesgirl.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: When Coachs liaison with the school nurse gets messy, vice principal Jess must enforce a new no fraternization policy among the teachers.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: As part of Winstons police academy training, the loft must pass a home visit and background check, which shouldnt be a problem until Jess admits she might be hiding illegal substances in her closet.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: The Daily Show is back with a new host but the same irreverent take on the fools, fibbers and various other f-words in todays headlines.

programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts as Dermot OLeary, Dame Jessica Ennis-Hill, Roman Kemp, Adam Kay, Angela Scanlon, Kay Burley and Alex Brooker try to help the contestants answer their way to a fortune.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandlers desperate effort to bond with Monicas dad by playing racquetball backfires when he accidentally gets too up-close-and-personal. Elsewhere, Rachel tries to teach `landlubber Joey how to sail without falling overboard, while Monica seeks to replicate Phoebes late grandmothers secret recipe by deconstructing her last remaining cookie.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel must hire an assistant and agonises over whether to hire an efficient, experienced woman, or sexy young Tag Jones. Ignoring her friends advice, she hires Tag and soon regrets it. To make matters worse, Tag is attracted to Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Engagement Picture
programme.desc: While taking an engagement picture for himself and Monica, Chandler cant stop pulling a strange face, Rachel enlists Joey to take Tag out for a night on the town, and Phoebe and Ross date a couple in the middle of a divorce.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Nap Partners
programme.desc: Wedding fever continues when Monica cant decide whether to appoint Rachel or Phoebe as her maid of honour. To help Monica decide, Joey and Ross test them on how they would react in certain wedding situations.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rosss Library Book
programme.desc: Ross is elated that the university library contains his doctoral dissertation, but he is shocked to discover that it is located in a remote corner frequently used by students having sex. Elsewhere, the tables are turned on Joey when Erin is the one to just want sex and not a relationship.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesnt Like Dogs
programme.desc: Joey may have ruined Rachels chances with Tag when he opens his mouth during Thanksgiving dinner, and Phoebe reveals that she has been secretly keeping a cute dog in her room for a few days while its owner is away.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel is dating her assistant, Tag, but they must keep it a secret at work because of the companys anti-dating policy. Her friends warn her that the relationship will only cause her trouble, but just for fun, she becomes more brazen about it.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Ross unexpectedly finds himself looking after Ben and decides to do something special for Christmas. Since all the Santa costumes have been rented out, Ross dons the best outfit left and entertains Ben as the holiday armadillo.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Cheesecakes
programme.desc: Chandler and Rachel pig out on a neighbours cheesecake that was mistakenly delivered to Chandler. They feel bad, but not quite guilty enough to refrain from eating a second one that has also been wrongly delivered.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Up All Night
programme.desc: During their fist night together, Rachel and Tag realise they forgot to ship out an important package at the office.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts as Dermot OLeary, Dame Jessica Ennis-Hill, Roman Kemp, Adam Kay, Angela Scanlon, Kay Burley and Alex Brooker try to help the contestants answer their way to a fortune.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes new job as a telemarketer gets off to a tricky start when the first person she calls, an office worker called Earl, tells her he feels unappreciated and wants to kill himself. Phoebe keeps him on the telephone, trying to persuade him otherwise and finally takes the desperate measure of going to his office to convince him to stay alive.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: Celebrating Rachels 30th birthday inspires the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays. Joey got angry with God for breaking their deal, Ross bought himself a sports car in an attempt to recapture his youth, and Monica got blind drunk and embarrassed herself at her surprise party.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joeys New Brain
programme.desc: Joey accidentally informs a cast member that she will be fired so that his character will get her characters brain, and Ross plans a surprise for Monica and Chandlers wedding - he wants to play the bagpipes.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Truth About London
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly reminisce about London until a startling revelation leaves Chandler floored. Meanwhile, Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes to play on Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Monica regrets telling a fellow bride-to-be about a cheaper bridal shop, and later she has to fight the woman tooth and nail for a unique wedding dress before competing with her to hire Chandlers favourite band for the night. Meanwhile, Joey and Ross discover that theyre dating the same girl.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is overjoyed to be nominated for a `Soapie, the third most prestigious award in daytime dramas. Meanwhile, engaged Monica frets when she realises she will never experience the thrill of a new relationship again, Ross spots Chandler sneaking out of a male strip club, and Phoebe meets a cute guy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross and Monicas Cousin
programme.desc: Monica is so perturbed by Chandlers instant attraction to her gorgeous visiting cousin that she persuades Ross to let her stay at his apartment. Despite being her blood relative, Ross cannot restrain himself from attempting to kiss her. She escapes to Phoebes apartment, but her beauty flabbergasts even Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel runs into an old sorority sister with whom she once shared a passionate encounter.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Young Maya pesters her dad to tell her why hes getting divorced, so he tells her the story of his (love) life. Has he missed out on his soulmate?

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Dale, Kurt and Nick decide to start their own business but things dont go as planned because of a slick investor, prompting the trio to pull off a harebrained and misguided kidnapping scheme.

programme.desc: Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson thrash out the hot stories of the week and are joined by actor and comedian Johnny Vegas and Joe Lycett.

programme.desc: Four longtime friends compete to embarrass each other with a series of hilarious dares. If they refuse, they lose. At the end, the big loser must endure an epic punishment.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A teenage lifeguard vanishes from a quiet community swimming hole less than three minutes after her mother dropped her off for work.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When a couple is found shot down in front of their home in the suburb of Thunderbolt, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence they must determine if one of the neighbours is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When a young girl is found murdered in Caledonia NY, police struggle to identify her. The tragedy leads the town make her one of their own, with the name Cali-Doe.

programme.title: Killer Britain With Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: ...Murnaghan. New. Elliot Turner: The chilling story of the self-professed playboy who brutally killed his 17-year-old girlfriend by strangulation in 2011. (S4, ep 7)

programme.title: Killer Britain With Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: In July 1991, Michael Sams kidnapped Julie Dart and took her to his workshop in Newark where he kept her in a makeshift coffin before killing her after she tried to escape.

programme.title: Nightmare in Suburbia
programme.desc: Despite being spotted in a pub with blood on his hands, the cold-blooded killer of teenager Colette Aram wasnt arrested until 17 years later.

programme.title: Nightmare in Suburbia
programme.desc: In 2000, the grizzly remains of a man were found in Sheffield and, with just a clay mould of his decomposed face, police uncovered a chilling tale of deathly greed.

programme.title: Robbie Coltranes Critical Evidence
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Robbie Coltranes Critical Evidence
programme.sub-title: DNA of a Murder : Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Murder Detective
programme.desc: Graham Hill is a hugely experienced crime fighter. In his career, he has seen it all and has been a part of some of the most significant murder hunts of recent years.

programme.title: Murder Detective
programme.desc: Maheswaran Kaneshan sought asylum in the UK, but became caught up in a gang feud that turned deadly. His life was controlled by the gang that had brought him to London. Gang bosses brutally beat Maheswaran, causing him to later die in hospital.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In broad daylight on a busy Woolwich street on 22nd May 2013, serving soldier Fusilier Lee Rigby was attacked and murdered by Islamic extremists Michael Adebolajo and Michael Adebowale.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: A look back at the rape and murder of Clare Wood that led to the launch of Clares Law.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When a 71-year-old man is found shot dead in a field, investigators suspect his killing is the result of a robbery. But as new evidence surfaces, detectives develop a wild theory to explain his death, and only a voice from the grave can prove it.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When a Navy officer succumbs to a mysterious illness after months at sea, nothing makes sense, until an autopsy yields a stunning revelation. All roads lead to dead ends, until they zero in on an unlikely target.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: A womans sudden death in a Detroit hotel unravels a dark web of secrets, lies, and deadly coincidences that hint at something far more sinister.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When Diana Burrow is found unresponsive, her family and police suspect her death is from natural causes until small-town whispers reveal the neighbourhood criminals may be hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas Bayou Country, investigators are stumped. The quest to track down her killer will take investigators 14 years, and lead to a new law.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 31-year-old real estate appraiser Mike Williams mysteriously vanishes while duck hunting in the Florida swamps in December of 2000, authorities suspect he accidentally drowned.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1980, radio intern Helene Pruszynski is found brutalized in a snowy field; after 37 years of fruitless leads, investigators tap into a public genealogy website that leads them across the country to the killer theyve been hunting.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: An unprecedented look inside high-stakes criminal cases, captured through the raw lens of body cam and surveillance footage. During a routine traffic stop in New Mexico, an officers radio falls silent, triggering a frantic manhunt.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a pastors second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife; her death never sat easy with pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross, who is eager to reopen the older case he never forgot.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Nacole Smith is brutally murdered in 1995 on a wooded path in Atlanta, the police and community rally around her mother as she seeks justice. It will take decades and a second brutal assault to finally reveal Nacoles killer.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: Benjamin Delgadillo: Step inside the criminal underworld as a small robbery spirals into brutal violence and reveals the ruthless code that governs life on the edge. (S2, Ep 6)

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When a wife is found drowned in her bathtub, her last written wishes point to suicide; a determined family and relentless detective ask if the answers lie in her obsession with death or the devious web of a cheating husband.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Disturbing cases featuring culprits who hide in plain sight. They give interviews, post on social media and show their faces whilst having blood on their hands.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: An evenings celebration is cut short when a couple is shot on a beach in Jacksonville, Florida. The surviving husband shares his incredible eyewitness account of how his wife was murdered.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Okla., an unsolved case comes to life when new evidence sheds light on a dead mans friend.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A star athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving his family heartbroken and detectives stumped. Lt. Joe Kenda pries into the victims personal life and learns more about his last night on Earth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A young woman found naked and strangled in a park close to her home.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A woman accused of shoplifting rams a police cruiser and leads officers on a dangerous, high-speed chase.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A suspect crashes into a jail, a woman has too much fun at the movies, a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery, and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man dressed as a chicken claiming to be tripping on mushrooms; a woman attempts to use a police car as her taxi to the bar; The Naked Cowboy is arrested for panhandling in Florida; and more!

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man convicted of murder gets into a shouting match with the victims mother; the judge holds a defendant in contempt 3 times after he yells at her during an online hearing.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.sub-title: Stacie V Cliff, Mark V Mel
programme.desc: Small claims cases are adjudicated in a studio courtroom by criminal law barrister Rob Rinder. He questions claimants and defendants before making his final judgements.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars

programme.title: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Fuzz Townsend are back on the road, but this time theyre looking for iconic vintage vehicles to restore and sell for a tidy profit.

programme.title: Richard Hammonds Workshop
programme.desc: Richard comes up with a cunning plan to create a show car to generate business for the Cog. Accountant Kamla gives Richard a harsh reality check.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: Derek rescues a 1967 Ford Mustang that has been idle for more than 28 years. The car is rusty and neglected, but that does not stop him from breathing new life into it.

programme.title: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry and Fuzz take on a risky Triumph Spitfire that has been in a crash. In their biggest restoration challenge yet, can they fix it?

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant hopes restoring and selling a 1980 Triumph Dolomite Sprint will help kickstart his farmhouse renovation. But will rust problems erode his profit?

programme.title: James May and The Dull Mens Club
programme.desc: James devises a solution for applying sun cream solo. Plus, he has a plucky plan to deal with noisy neighbours and plays records on a pottery wheel.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Drew and Paul head to the Midlands to look at a Swedish classic, the Volvo Amazon. Paul falls for an early Toyota MR2, but he has to convince Drew it will eventually turn a profit.

programme.title: Hell Roads
programme.desc: Around the globe lie eight Hell Roads, each with dangers. Meet the people who risk their lives braving avalanches, rockslides and even gunfire as they drive these highways.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead work together to give new life to run-down classic automobiles to resell them at a profit. Working on a tight budget, Mike must find a vehicle for Ant to fix, but that isnt always the easiest task.

programme.title: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The Golf GTi was a symbol of the 80s and gave birth to the term "hot hatch"; Mike finds a prime example of a Rabbit which he believes can be transformed; the market is crying out for cars like this, but Ant has a lot of work to do.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire decides to give Phil a surprising anniversary present, but she has a history of giving bad gifts. Meanwhile, Cameron and Mitchell call their party-girl friend for a night on the town.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Calamity and comedy go hand-in-hand when the Dunphys throw Luke a birthday bash. The party is certainly memorable, especially when Cam shows up as Fizbo the clown.

programme.desc: Chef Ramsey tackles spoiled food, fake fish and a small customer base when he visits Sante La Brea in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: Our teams go back to school at an extraordinary floating classroom on Cambodias Tonle Sap Lake. But wholl come a cropper after a hard-graft harvesting task?

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire
programme.desc: Slapstick film about a divorced actor who is willing to go to any lengths to get his children back, even posing as a matronly Scottish housekeeper. His family, taken in by the disguise, decide to employ the eccentric but apparently capable widow, and everyone is happy with the arrangement - until the mothers old boyfriend reappears and tries to become a father figure to the children.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: From the outer reaches of space to the small-town streets of suburbia, the hunt comes home. The universes most lethal hunters are stronger, smarter and deadlier than ever before, having genetically upgraded themselves with DNA from other species. When a boy accidentally triggers their return to Earth, only a ragtag crew of ex-soldiers and an evolutionary biologist can prevent the end of the human race.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their insightful and passionate takes on the weeks biggest and best shows.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Robert has just three weeks to plan his wedding. But will his trusting bride Adrianna be impressed with his royal African theme ceremony?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Matthew has just three weeks, £14,000 and the help of his best man to make his dreams of a Roman Empire-themed wedding come true. But will his fiancee Zoe-Jade approve?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: James and Hollie are desperate to get hitched, but dont have the cash. They are given £12,000 and the chance for James to prove himself to the woman he loves by making every decision about the wedding alone. He and Hollie have agreed in the presence of a lawyer that she will know nothing until the big day. Will James find the perfect venue and get the dress right?

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, president of Alfred Angelo, the second largest bridal retailer in the USA, goes undercover in his own company posing as a personal trainer who is competing in a reality TV show to win money to start his own business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, president and COO of discount retail chain Family Dollar, goes undercover posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition who is trying to win money to open his own bar.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Willie and Julie kick off this competition from the Cambridge area with their hearty menu. Day two sees healthy food options from sporty pair Jeavon and Steve, and finally its Italian Ricas turn with the help of Lynne to cook a high-end meal.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Cambridgeshire, big kids Wizz and Luke throw a childrens party-themed night, Diana and Mark do fine dining, and Ed and Steve serve an enormous trifle.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Cheltenham, perfectionist Michelle and her husband, Bryan Adams tribute singer Russell, are the first to host. Day two is Lydia and Calums turn to host and they hope a rustic theme will bag them the grand.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to South Philadelphia to try to turn around family-run restaurant Chiarellas, which is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian establishments. That isnt the only problem facing owners Tommy and Dina Defino. Their marriage is on the verge of collapse.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay returns to restaurants he tried to help in the past, such as Downcity in Providence, RI, Classic American in West Babylon, NY, and Davide in Boston to check on their progress.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay revisits La Frite, Kingston Cafe, Capri and Spanish Pavilion to see if the owners succeeded in following his advice.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Boston for the first of two visits to La Galleria 33, an Italian restaurant opened in 2006 by raucous sisters Rita and Lisa. The two siblings grew up working at their fathers successful restaurant nearby, but when they opened their own establishment, the customers didnt materialise. The sisters blame everything from the weather to the tablecloths for their failures.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon confronts restaurant owners and sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum. His stand-off with the siblings is just the beginning of the explosive action. He finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the restaurants failings. Can Gordon wrangle these hapless proprietors and stubborn employees back into one productive team and save the restaurant?

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: The normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the seething Taskmaster. And Joanna Page smashes up a sheep.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of best bits from recent episodes of `8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown hosted by Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent, featuring Jon Richardson, Joe Wilkinson, Richard Ayoade, Judi Love, Roisin Conaty, Lee Mack, and many more.

programme.title: Sean Lock: Keep It Light
programme.desc: Sean Lock presents his blend of surreal yet insightful stand-up comedy, recorded at the Theatre Royal in Margate, in which he airs his mischievous views on parenting, old age, and immigration.

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Jenny Joyce organises a 50s style prom, Erin, Clare and Michelle are looking for prom dates, but Orla has already got someone special in mind. And a new girl arrives.

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, excitement in Derry is at fever pitch for President Bill Clintons visit. Meanwhile James gets a surprise and Granda Joe embarks on a mysterious plan of his own.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended edition of the show with Jimmy Carr and team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, who are joined by celebrity guests Alex Jones, Joe Wilkinson, Danny Dyer and Miles Jupp.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: With guests Henning Wehn, Denise van Outen, Nick Helm and Vernon Kay.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
