programme.title: Caban Banana Gareth yr Orangutan
programme.desc: Ymweld ag ysgolion, pynciau ysgafn, lot o chwerthin! Lighthearted subjects and lots of laughs!

programme.title: Pentre Papur Pop
programme.desc: Ar yr antur popwych heddiw mar ffrindiaun creu deinosor ar gyfer amgueddfa Pentre Papur Pop. On todays poptastic adventure the friends craft a dinosaur for the Pop Paper City museum.

programme.title: Byd Tad-cu
programme.desc: Ar ôl ymweliad at y barbwr, mae Lewis eisiau gwybod Pam bod fy ngwallt yn tyfu?. After a visit to the barbers, Lewis wants to know why his hair grows? Tadcu has an answer.

programme.title: Pablo
programme.desc: Mae gan Pablo ei ffordd ei hun o weld y byd, a heddiw nid ywn siwr pun ai i dacluso ei degannau neu chwarae efo nhw. Pablo cant decide whether to play with his toys or put them away!

programme.title: Help Llaw
programme.desc: Cyfres hardd a hilariws yw Help Llaw - un syn cofleidio, serennu a dyrchafu Cymry ifanc sydd ag anableddau ac anghenion cyfathrebu.

programme.title: Y Smyrffs
programme.desc: Following a community of small, blue creatures living in a mushroom village. The Smurfs, led by Papa Smurf, face off against the evil wizard Gargamel and his cat Azrael, who constantly try to capture them.

programme.title: Larfa
programme.desc: What are the silly crew up to this time we wonder?

programme.title: CIC
programme.desc: Gwers jiwdo gydar judoka Olympaidd Natalie Powell, Heledd a Lloyd yn cael tro ar gleddyfaeth, a chlwb martial arts Tremadog ywr nesaf i daclo Sialens y Sgwad. This time: martial arts.

programme.title: Y Tri Mysgedwr
programme.desc: Mae dyn ifanc or enw Hari yn cyrraedd y llys, gan honni ei fod yn frawd hyn ir Brenin. A young man named Henri arrives in court, claiming to be the Kings elder brother.

programme.title: Cymry ar Gynfas
programme.desc: Yn y rhaglen hon, yr artist Anthony Evans syn ymdrechu i greu portread or bardd Myrddin ap Dafydd. Artist Anthony Evans sets out to create a portrait of Welsh bard Myrddin ap Dafydd.

programme.title: Darllediad Gwleidyddol
programme.desc: Darllediad etholiadol gan y Ceidwadwyr Cymreig. Election broadcast by the Welsh Conservatives.

programme.title: Rownd a Rownd
programme.desc: Cyfres ddrama boblogaidd am fywyd pobol ifanc yn y gogledd. Popular drama series focusing on the lives of young people in North Wales.

programme.title: Heno
programme.desc: Rhaglen gylchgrawn nosweithiol gyda straeon o bob cwr o Gymru. Nightly magazine with stories from all over Wales and special guests.

programme.title: Newyddion S4C ar Tywydd
programme.desc: News and weather.

programme.title: Y Byd yn ei Le
programme.sub-title: Plaid Werdd Cymru and Reform UK
programme.desc: Bydd Catrin Haf Jones ar Athro Richard Wyn Jones yn bwrw golwg ar addewidion Plaid Werdd Cymru a Reform UK. A look at the promises of the Wales Green Party and of Reform UK.

programme.title: Newyddion S4C ar Tywydd
programme.desc: News and weather.

programme.title: Ffermio
programme.desc: Cyfres syn edrych ar y byd amaeth, yn cynnwys rai o bynciau llosg y diwydiant. A series exploring the world of agriculture across Wales.

programme.title: Sgwrs Dan y Lloer
programme.desc: Elin Fflur syn sgwrsio dan olaur lloer ym Mwynder Maldwyn gydar hyfryd Mari Lovgreen. In tonights episode Elin Fflur chats with the lovely Mari Lovgreen.

programme.title: Adeiladur Freuddwyd: Camp Out West
programme.desc: Nin dilyn siwrnai gwr a gwraig, Jon ac Emilie, au ci, Maggie, wrth i nhw adeiladur freuddwyd yng ngorllewin Cymru. Following Jon and Emilies journey as they build a dream in West Wales.

programme.title: Arfordir Cymru
programme.desc: Bedwyr Rees journeys from the River Dyfi to Aberystwyth. He visits a farm which is below sea level, hears about the flooding of a mythical kingdom and learns that Aberystwyth street names arent always as straightforward as they first appear.

programme.title: GISDA
programme.desc: Mae criw GISDA ar eu ffordd i Lerpwl am noson. Er y cyffro, mae gor-bryder a diffyg hyder yn creu problemau i rai. The GISDA crew are having a night in Liverpool, but anxiety takes over.

programme.title: Raisinghani v/s Raisinghani
programme.desc: A sharp-witted lawyer making her mark at her fathers law firm clashes with an ambitious colleague over ethics and morality. Amidst their conflict, a new intern joins the company with a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Discovering Music

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: In depth profiles of music legends with interviews and analysis with experts and commentators.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Being admired by the inventor of an anti-ageing formula is handy for Caroline, who is eager to keep her looks, but a handsome man forces her to make a big decision.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Criminal lawyer Slade has his reasons for wanting his colleague dead. He meticulously plans the perfect murder, but theres one thing that he overlooks.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran Fred Pearson is a broken man after years of punishment from his sergeant. But years later, he gets his chance for revenge.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Best Chess Player in the World
programme.desc: To prove he is a gifted chess player, a man explains how he planned the perfect murder after discovering his wife was unfaithful.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A suspicious sergeant (William Conrad) digs when a death is labelled accidental. With David Wayne.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A woman (Anne Francis) stands trial for her husbands murder, and the family maid (Ruth Roman) holds the key to the truth.

programme.title: Making A Maestro
programme.desc: Feel the pressure rise as junior conductors tackle modern music and face a royal surprise on the road to Making a Maestro.

programme.title: The Misfits
programme.desc: Clark Gable and Marilyn Monroe appear in their last screen roles in this piercing drama about contrasting attitudes and lifestyles set against the brawling backdrop of a Reno rodeo.

programme.title: Alchemy: Dire Straits Live
programme.desc: Captures Dire Straits during their two-night gig at the Hammersmith Odeon. The climax of their Love Over Gold tour, hits include `Romeo and Juliet and `Sultans of Swing.

programme.title: The Eagles: Live From The L.A. Forum
programme.desc: The six-time Grammy-winning rockers take to the stage at the Forum in California over three nights, delighting fans with iconic hits like `Hotel California and `Take It Easy.

programme.title: Chaplin
programme.desc: Re-creation of the life of comic genius Charlie Chaplin, from his humble beginnings in south London through his early days in British vaudeville, his silent movie career in America and his late masterpieces. His turbulent personal life saw four marriages and an enforced exile from the US - though he returned to receive an honorary Oscar in 1972.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Carrie Underwood, Hardy, Breland, Ben Fuller
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Greatest Basslines
programme.sub-title: Peter Hook: Joy Division, New Order

programme.title: Record On
programme.sub-title: Record On: New Order- Power, Corruption and Lies
programme.desc: The story of New Orders 1983 album Power, Corruption, and Lies, exploring how the group turned to electronic instrumentation, out of which came the commercially successful hit Blue Monday.

programme.title: Pet Shop Boys Dreamworld: The Greatest Hits Live at the Royal Arena Copenhagen
programme.desc: Pet Shop Boys perform their greatest hits tour at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen.

programme.title: Pet Shop Boys Dreamworld: The Greatest Hits Live at the Royal Arena Copenhagen
programme.desc: Pet Shop Boys perform their greatest hits tour at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An ageing hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they are being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team, with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin is a Milwaukee realtor who receives a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime whom he left for dead. He now finds himself thrust back into a world of ruthless hit men and double-crosses that turn his open houses into deadly war zones.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Geeky highschooler Sam Witwicky buys his first-ever car, hoping it will improve his chances with Mikaela. Imagine his surprise when his beat-down Camaro transforms into an alien robot called `Bumblebee and asks for his assistance in a deadly war.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: Mikaela and Sam once again join forces with Optimus Prime again to save Earth from ruthless robot The Fallen.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Decepticons become involved in a space race to find a hidden Cybertronian spacecraft stranded on the Moon. Sam Witwicky must come to the aid of the Autobots to defeat the evil Decepticons to stop them discovering the secrets of the Cybertronian craft.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: As humanity picks up the pieces after an epic battle, a shadowy group emerges to gain control of history. Meanwhile, a powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins find themselves on a fast moving bullet train from Tokyo to Morioka with only a few stops in between. They discover their missions are not unrelated to each other.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A normally well-behaved teenager goes wild while his parents are out of town. In charge at his parents smart house, the 17-year-old sees the chance to make a fast buck when the prostitute, on the run from a scary pimp, appears at his door. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman, Zsa-zsa Korda appoints his only daughter, a nun, as sole heir to his estate. As Korda embarks on a new enterprise, they soon become the target of scheming tycoons, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydias life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuices name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Were the Millers
programme.desc: Indebted to a big-time drug lord, a pot dealer travels to Mexico with a fake family and a camper to pick up a large shipment and smuggle it into the U.S.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two inseparable best friends navigate the last weeks of high school and are invited to a gigantic house party. Together with their nerdy friend, they spend a long day trying to score enough alcohol to supply the party and inebriate two girls in order to kick-start their sex lives before they go off to college. Their quest is complicated after one of them falls in with two inept cops who are determined to show him a good time.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Ólafur Johann Ólafsson.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Aisha
programme.desc: Caught in limbo for years in Irelands immigration system, a young Nigerian woman develops a friendship with an employee who she meets at one of the accommodation centres.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: The Angels Share
programme.desc: A troubled young father barely avoids jail and, after visiting a whisky distillery, he is inspired to find a way out of his hopeless life.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: A woman undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: Miss You Already

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Super-Charlie

programme.title: Charlottes Web

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.desc: Family and friends of the iconic Hollywood actor come together to share memories of his life and fruitful career.

programme.title: Going Clear: Scientology and the Prison of Belief
programme.desc: Former Scientologists talk about their experiences and why exactly they left the controversial religion.

programme.title: The Alpinist

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Victory in war doesnt just require sound military strategy, vital resources and equipment are also critical. Discover how the Axis powers failed in this regard.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: We examine how each Axis Power had troubles on their own home front, leading to disaster in the final days of the war.

programme.desc: Alice Roberts travels across the Midlands, looking at the best archaeology uncovered last year in the heart of England. We join palaeontologist Dr Dean Lomax in the middle of the largest artificial lake in the country, Rutland Water.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The west of Britain is explored for the best of its archaeological digs and post excavation discoveries. In north Somerset, archaeologists are blown away by the discovery of an entirely new Roman town.

programme.desc: Join a voyage to Farne Islands, home to seals and seabirds, early Christian communities and one of the first landing sites for the terrifying Viking raiders.

programme.title: Secrets in the Jungle

programme.title: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: In the tropical lowlands of Northern Colombia, a team of scientists discover a massive, unidentified animal vertebra; dozens of jars packed with bones are uncovered in Cambodia; a strange rusted vehicle is found on the small island of Peleliu.

programme.title: Battle 360
programme.desc: Using amazing CGI animation to help tell the story of World War II battles. Join World War II aircraft carrier USS Enterprise as she sets sail in the Pacific on a mission to sink enemy submarines.

programme.desc: Washington State: A new report is made every 55 hours in Washington state, which is Americas highest rate of UFO sightings per capita - but why are UFOs choosing to hover here?

programme.desc: Is Gustav, the legendary man-eating crocodile, accused of killing hundreds of people in Africa, still alive and well today?

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.desc: A closer look at New Zealand cops as they deal with the challenges of monitoring the nations busiest motorway.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A closer look at New Zealand cops as they deal with the challenges of monitoring the nations busiest motorway.

programme.title: Border Security: Canadas Front Line
programme.desc: Work of customs and immigration officials, following procedures they use to protect their borders.

programme.title: Border Security: Canadas Front Line
programme.desc: Work of customs and immigration officials, following procedures they use to protect their borders.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: More footage from Australia as we follow the men and women of the highways agencies as they patrol the countrys roads and freeways.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A young motorcyclist executes a reckless one-wheel manoeuvre in front of Ash Bowdens unmarked police car, and finds himself in deeper trouble when he makes excuses and denies responsibility.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Con men pose as police officers to steal thousands of pounds from elderly victims, but the ringleader makes a crucial mistake. Also, a shoplifter dances like nobody is watching, but the security cameras are filming her every move.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: An adventure centre and a garage are burgled, but the businesss own cameras dont show the thiefs face, so the hope is that street cameras can help crack the case. Also, a partially blind man is deceived at a cashpoint by an unscrupulous thief.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A couple restoring a run-down house disagree about installing CCTV, but the cameras prove their worth when an intruder invades their dream home. Also, a burglar robbing a pizza takeaway gets a taste of his own medicine when his bike is stolen.

programme.title: The Burbs
programme.desc: An overstressed husband becomes obsessed with finding out the secret of his mysterious new neighbours. Concocting a series of increasingly outlandish schemes to discover the truth about the weird sounds he hears coming from the basement next door, the man settles on the theory that the family are a front for a cannibalistic cult.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An unexpected burst of passion sweeps through the station during a Bajoran festival, resulting in odd combinations of couples.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: ONeill tries to track down Carter, who is missing on Earth and endangered by deadly experiments.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The season finale opens with Wraith ships on a mission to kill the team and take the lost city. Is reprogramming Atlantis to self-destruct really the only solution?

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Investigating the discovery of a piece of metal bearing a United States Air Force Insignia, the Away Team finds itself trapped in the world of The Hotel Royale, a novel come to life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While on a routine exploration of a new planet, Voyager responds to the distress calls of a Kazon warship. Upon investigation, they find the Kazon ship hobbled by an accident caused by Federation technology - a clear signal that Voyager may be carrying a traitor.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a retired FBI agent is tortured and killed while working a security job, Scola and Nina go under cover as a married couple deep in the diamond game as the team tries to find out who is responsible.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: After taking a terrorist down, the FBI and their Fugitive Task Force partners search for the terrorists wife, who is determined to follow through with her husbands deadly plan; LaCroixs daughter is taken by Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew explores an automated space station that performs its repairs with an efficiency thats too good to be true.

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: An item from the warehouse puts Mykas father in peril.

programme.title: Brit Cops: War on Crime
programme.desc: Lincolnshire police might reap a bumper harvest in a drugs raid and deal with a multiple vehicle pileup on a busy road.

programme.title: Night Cops
programme.desc: Wrexham police rush to the side of an officer in distress, and law enforcers in Torquay come to the aid of a victim knocked to the ground by an envious boyfriend. Finally, policemen in Crewe employ their persuasive powers to tame a rather excitable youth.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Reality series following the work of New Zealands customs agents.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Reality series following the work of New Zealands customs agents.

programme.title: Africas Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Just off the Tanzanian coastline lies an island Utopia. Its diverse habitats provide homes for a multitude of creatures living above the water and below. And when the time is right, a mysterious being rises from the deep to feed in the rich waters. This is Mafia Island.

programme.title: Africas Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: In one of Africas greatest lakes, rock and water set the stage for evolutions most magnificent display. This episode tells the story of this remarkable example of evolution in action, as well as showing how the lake provides for a range of life, both above and below the surface.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Some animals adapt to the environment by becoming bigger or faster, but others have evolved more interesting abilities.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Looking at some of the bizarre and amazing animals that live under the sea.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: A look at animals whose body parts give them an edge in their battle for survival.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: The peacock mantis, when threatened by predators, unfurls its wings, showing warning colours and patterns.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: The day-to-day lives and challenges of some of Indias most iconic species and creatures.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: The day-to-day lives and challenges of some of Indias most iconic species and creatures.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Embark on an exhilarating journey as Lizzie traverses air, land and sea to encounter Alaskan wildlife and explore the worlds most remote corners. Join scientists eavesdropping on underwater Arctic residents.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Traverse the Canadian rainforest, gaze up at towering redwoods, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences North Americas wild west coast. Encounter wolves and bears whilst salmon journey upstream to spawn.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores the volcanic islands and biological wonderland of Galapagos in this three-part documentary. Here, he charts the archipelagos explosive rise from the ocean millions of years ago, and takes a look at its unique wildlife.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: David Attenborough stumbles upon species found nowhere else in the world that show how life has to quickly adapt to the islands ever-changing landscapes.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the unusual species that inhabit the unique islands of Galapagos, including giant tortoise Lonesome George.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates the life story of Jumbo the elephant, the celebrity animal superstar who is said to have inspired the movie `Dumbo. Attenborough joins a team of scientists and conservationists to unravel the story of Jumbo.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailands Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

programme.title: Colombias Wild Coast
programme.desc: Explore Colombias wild coast, a natural fortress surrounded by shark-infested seas, blanketed in impenetrable jungle and teaming with deadly snakes.

programme.title: Colombias Wild Coast
programme.desc: A young female black crab is about to undertake the biggest mission of her life - to escort her 80,000 eggs from her mountain top home.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates the life story of Jumbo the elephant, the celebrity animal superstar who is said to have inspired the movie `Dumbo. Attenborough joins a team of scientists and conservationists to unravel the story of Jumbo.

programme.title: Africas Wild Roommates -- How Animals Share Bed and Board
programme.desc: An exploration of the joys and sorrows of living together, following a range of different animals in Africa that live together in communities.

programme.title: Seasons of the Wild
programme.sub-title: The Everglades: The Season of Drought
programme.desc: In Southern Florida, a unique and complex ecosystem known as the Everglades has entered its winter season. Predator and prey are forced to live in close proximity due to a limited supply of water.

programme.title: Seasons of the Wild
programme.sub-title: The Everglades: The Season of Flood
programme.desc: Waters flood Southern Floridas mangroves and marshes. Many of the 600 animal species that live in the Everglades disperse during this time, expanding their hunting and breeding grounds.

programme.title: Becoming Orangutan
programme.desc: Love is in the air as junior-school buds Valentino, Yutris, and Madaras bromance blossoms and a distractible Beni leans into his love of food.

programme.title: Becoming Orangutan
programme.desc: Buckle in for a roller coaster of emotions as the sanctuarys orangutans move toward their release into the wild and Beni goes on a diet.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: In the heart of central Mexico, lies Sierra Gorda, a region that is home to bobcats, pumas and flying squirrels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: Freeze time as water becomes a force of change in Earths most frigid ecosystems. Hunt for unsuspecting seals with polar bears, bathe in natural hot springs with macaques, and try out a unique survival strategy with Arctic foxes.

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: In Australia, meet the worlds most venomous snake. Plus, in nearby oceans, discover the deadly nature the marine creatures that share these tropical waters.

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: In the South American rainforest, theres a tiny frog thats packed with poison. While near Sydney, Australia, youll meet the worlds most venomous spider.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: In his mid-eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the depths of the Great Barrier Reef to the ancient rainforests of Borneo, following his adventure across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: Home Planet
programme.desc: In his eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the stunning Great Barrier Reef to the rainforests of Borneo, follow his voyage across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the rise of life on our planet, from the explosion of first life on seabeds hundreds of millions of years ago to life today.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David descends beneath the waves at night in the state of the art Triton submersible, the first of its kind to visit the reef. He meets some of the tiny coral animals that built the reef and helped to turn it into an underwater wonderland.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David continues his exploration of the Great Barrier Reef, aboard the research vessel the Alucia. He discovers the incredible animals that visit the reef every year, from birds to whales, some travelling thousands of kilometres to get there.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David examines what the next few decades hold for this remarkable community of animals, as well as what is being done to save it.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: Its Mothers Day on the Indian subcontinent. For a mother Bengal tiger, its time to train her cubs to hunt, while lions and cobras start the mating season.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Taking a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures, celebrating the Lone Star States landscapes and wildlife, and looking at how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas unique habitats.

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Natural predators use camouflaged markings and hidden tunnels to pull off feats of speed, cunning and agility in their hunts.

programme.title: Wild Crusades
programme.desc: Dr Wolfgang Dittus explores the complex society of the toque macaque population in Sri Lanka. These feisty group-living monkeys are found nowhere else on earth, and are at the heart of the longest primate research project ever undertaken.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: In the heart of central Mexico, lies Sierra Gorda, a region that is home to bobcats, pumas and flying squirrels.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: Its Mothers Day on the Indian subcontinent. For a mother Bengal tiger, its time to train her cubs to hunt, while lions and cobras start the mating season.

programme.desc: Explore Colombias wild coast, a natural fortress surrounded by shark-infested seas, blanketed in impenetrable jungle and teaming with deadly snakes.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A retiree is duped on his own doorstep by a master scammer. Also a shopkeeper grapples a gun from the hands of an armed robber. And a fraudster slips up when he tries to claim compensation after a fall.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A jeweller refuses to budge even though hes looking down the barrel of a gun. Also, a break-in at a theatre means the opening night is in jeopardy, and a pair of pet pilferers steal a tortoise from a zoo.

They are surrounded by brick walls and would like a wildlife-focused space with £3,000 to spend. The first challenge is to make the budget go as far as possible, and so the team source patio slabs that are identical to what the couple have to give them a bigger social space.

programme.desc: For many farmers, summer means one thing - show season - and the Royal Highland Show is the highlight in the calendar. The Barclays boys are showing pedigree Beltex and their finest Suffolks before going head-to-head in the Young Handlers competition. Its also a major event for budding young farmers Rachel and Camy, who, for the first time, are showing only animals raised on their own farm. Hopes are pinned on their Cheviot lamb Patch to prove shes every bit as good as Camy predicted.

Along the way they test the limits of mechanical and physical endurance.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: In the knife-edge world of hunters and hunted, mammals ability to learn new tricks is their key to survival. A killer whale is shown sneaking into a pool where elephant seal pups learn to swim, slow motion cameras reveal how the star-nosed mole can smell prey underwater, and young ibex demonstrate how to escape a fox by running up an almost vertical cliff face.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: An investigation of marine invertebrates and the way they thrive in the toughest parts of the ocean. Divers swim into a shoal of predatory Humboldt squid as the creatures emerge from the depths to hunt in packs, time-lapse photography reveals thousands of starfish gathering under the Arctic ice to devour a seal carcass, and a giant octopus protects her eggs by using her body to wall up a cave, starving to death in the process.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: An incredible look at plants and their ingenious solutions to lifes challenges. Time-lapse photography reveals plants acting like fly-paper, or spring-loaded traps, to catch insects, while vines are shown developing suckers and claws to haul themselves up trees. Later the importance of shape for survival is illustrated by the dragons blood tree, which captures mist and shades its roots through its unusual form.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: An amazing look at primates and their survival skills, from complex societies to tool use. Huge armies of Hamadryas baboons are seen battling on the plains of Ethiopia in order to steal females and settle old scores, Japanese macaques beat the cold by lounging in thermal springs - but only if they come from the right family, and an orang-utan baby fails in its struggle to make an umbrella out of leaves to keep off the rain.

programme.desc: Mike approaches Alison to discuss their finances following the loss of their BandB business. However, Alison is more preoccupied with plotting revenge on the Ghosts for April Fools Day and recruits a playful Humphrey to execute her plans. But who will prove the hardest to fool? Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice?

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright advertises for a live-in housekeeper and outsells a Hoover salesman.

programme.desc: Granville has some outdated Christmas puddings to sell, but needs a clever plan to lure his sceptical customers into buying them. Elsewhere, Madge is convinced that her house is haunted and is refusing to sleep in her bedroom.

programme.title: My Family

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: An eventful night out is had by all, as Janey and Susan go to a hen night, and Roger goes on a blind date, and Ben, who should be at home looking after Kenzo, spends more time out than he bargained for.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben and Susan go off to a couples retreat for a weekend - at which they prove to be less than ideal guests - leaving Janey and Michael vying for the affections of Michaels new boyfriend. However, the triangle proves to be more Bermuda than eternal.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Kenzo seems to be the victim of a revenge campaign by Michaels old art teacher, and Susan finds herself caught up in a sexual harassment case at work.

programme.desc: Susan wants to look her best for an impending school reunion. When she is asked to give the keynote address, however, she decides that her best may need some help. Unfortunately, Ben is on hand to administer the `Cavitox.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats cockapoo Betsy, who has been receiving treatment after being hit by a van five months ago, but now she has gangrene. Also treated is bijou puppy Angel, who has a genetic deformity.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Tthe emotional story of Noel Fitzpatricks dog Keira and her recovery after being hit by a van in September 2020.

programme.desc: Noel and his team take a look at a variety of dogs such as chocolate Labrador Inca, cavapoo Nala, and great Dane Charles.

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Jonathan has a camera put inside his lungs to find out if he has cancer. James needs a knee operation so he can play with his children again, and a growth is removed from Jans ear.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis meets Oscar-winning actress Dame Judi Dench. Having graced the stage and screen for over 60 years, including iconic turns as Queen Elizabeth in Shakespeare in Love and MI5 chief M in Bond, Judi is regarded as one of Britains greatest ever actors. Louis meets Judi at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre and her life away from acting.

programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake

programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A woman arrives at Fitzpatricks surgery with 14 of her rescue dogs, including a tiny papillon needing a double knee replacement. A mountain dog has an exploded disc in his spine. And a German Shepherd is fitted with a specially designed bionic foot.

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A professional wrestler wife swaps lives with a devoted wife and mum whose disconnected husband prefers video games over family time.

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A materialistic city wife who believes appearance is everything swaps lives with a charity-minded farmer wife.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Bijal and Darshan struggle to part with their possessions, but they really want to create an environment free of the chaos for their son, who finds it hard to concentrate in the clutter. They have both come from families that hold onto things, and they are forced to confront the habit they have inherited.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis meets Dominic Harrison, aka singer and musician Yungblud, often regarded as one of the UK music scenes brightest stars. Louis joins Yungblud in the USA, on the last two nights of a whirlwind tour.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael begins in the port of Batumi on the dazzling Caucasian Riviera. He savours the soul of Georgia in its wine and discovers a surprise nineteenth century tea plantation in the West Georgian countryside. The seat of power beckons in Kutaisi, home to the wonderful glass dome built for the Parliament of Georgia when it moved here from the capital, Tbilisi, in 2012.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Paris is freed but celebrations are premature. As Montgomerys Arnhem raid and the Polish uprising fail badly, it seems five years in the war is still not at an end.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Auschwitz survivors and Himmlers SS adjutant contribute to this harrowing account of the most chilling and inhuman chapter of WWII.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As the net closes upon Berlin, Hitler retreats to an underground bunker and with his officers faces the end of the Reich.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Japan had entered the war confident that superior spiritual strength and discipline would prevail. By 1944, they were fighting for survival, crippled by shortages of food, metals and fuel. After massive defeats at Saipan, Iwo Jima and Okinawa, a continuous campaign of Allied bombing kills 250,000 and leaves eight million homeless.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie sets out to explore the meandering waterways of inner city Birmingham including the Soho Loop and the Engine Arm Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney.

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Travelling to the depths of the seas to reveal spectacular lifeforms, from alien monsters to pack-hunting killer whales.

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a natural history of the oceans. Among the oddities featured here are terrifying fish with massive teeth which feed on prey twice their size, plus weird flashing jellyfish and deep sea sharks. All of these bizarre creatures inhabit submerged mountain ranges and volcanoes that are far larger than anything found on land.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie explores the picturesque Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek has to extract a vintage car from its bizarre resting place, while Charlie picks up a Vauxhall Viva from a man who has owned it for over half a century.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and islands. Surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia, the Coral Triangle is one of the most beautiful corners of the oceans.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across the Kalahari in Southern Africa. Along the way, Simon tracks wildebeest with a group of one of the regions indigenous inhabitants, the San, who are renowned for their hunting and tracking techniques.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie takes a tumble at Buckby Locks in Northamptonshire and has a problem with his power supply and battery bank.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret meet their new neighbours. Murder and mystery ensue, when Victor digs out his ventriloquists dummy, and finds it promptly banished by Margaret.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors weekend at the seashore starts off badly when he discovers a dead seagull in the bathroom, and later, he ends up with a glass of beer glued to his head.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is unable to sleep, and things get so desperate that he contemplates opening Ronnie and Mildreds Christmas present from last year.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: The day of the wedding has arrived, and the drugs are beginning to affect Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob and Thelma begin their married life with a Norwegian honeymoon - far away from Terrys destructive influence.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob comes back from his honeymoon to find that Terry is off his beer and is going out with Thelmas sister Susan. Is Terry in love?

The seat of power beckons in Kutaisi, home to the wonderful glass dome built for the Parliament of Georgia when it moved here from the capital, Tbilisi, in 2012.

programme.title: World at War

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Auschwitz survivors and Himmlers SS adjutant contribute to this harrowing account of the most chilling and inhuman chapter of WWII.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As the net closes upon Berlin, Hitler retreats to an underground bunker and with his officers faces the end of the Reich.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Japan had entered the war confident that superior spiritual strength and discipline would prevail. By 1944, they were fighting for survival, crippled by shortages of food, metals and fuel. After massive defeats at Saipan, Iwo Jima and Okinawa, a continuous campaign of Allied bombing kills 250,000 and leaves eight million homeless.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie sets out to explore the meandering waterways of inner city Birmingham including the Soho Loop and the Engine Arm Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney.

programme.title: The Blue Planet

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a natural history of the oceans. Among the oddities featured here are terrifying fish with massive teeth which feed on prey twice their size, plus weird flashing jellyfish and deep sea sharks. All of these bizarre creatures inhabit submerged mountain ranges and volcanoes that are far larger than anything found on land.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and islands. Surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia, the Coral Triangle is one of the most beautiful corners of the oceans.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across the Kalahari in Southern Africa. Along the way, Simon tracks wildebeest with a group of one of the regions indigenous inhabitants, the San, who are renowned for their hunting and tracking techniques.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.desc: Victor is unable to sleep, and things get so desperate that he contemplates opening Ronnie and Mildreds Christmas present from last year.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a rail journey through Germany, steered by a Bradshaws Continental Railway Guide published in 1936. His unique window on Europe between the world wars takes him through a tumultuous period in German history, when the nations first democracy and its vibrant culture of art, design and decadence were swept away by fascism, nationalism and the increasing likelihood of war.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team pay over the odds for a VW Campervan, but can they hope to break even when they turn out a lovely bus for auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 1969 Morris Mini Cooper MkII is totally restored by specialists. They give it the full works, which means only one thing... any chance of profit heads towards an open window.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Looking at the Allied scientists attempts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon, and debating the moral implications of its use. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.sub-title: We Shall Fight Them In The Streets
programme.desc: When planning for the Nazi invasion of the UK the physical defence of London was considered crucial. A ring of steel and concrete was thrown up around the capital as well as utilising natural defences.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce heads to Chester Cathedral to meet 2,000 eager visitors waiting in the nave. Amongst the treasures coming under scrutiny are some of the smallest and most valuable pieces of furniture to be seen on the show, an Elvis `hound dog which almost got `The King into hot water with the police, and a group of jewels smuggled out of pre-Revolution Russia sewn into the hem of a dress.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at the Ascot Racecourse, where the Pavilion is full of people hoping for a high valuation of their old treasures. Among the objects valued are the first ever document copying machine, dating back to 1780.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going when put under the hammer. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton le Dale for the sale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave gets a nasty surprise when he opens the bonnet of a fast Ford from the 80s, and an Austin Heavy 12 nearly a century old sets off a bidding war at the auction.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Looking at the Allied scientists attempts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon, and debating the moral implications of its use. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Concentrating on the predatory skills of some of the planets most charismatic hunters - whales, dolphins, tuna, shark and rapier-nosed billfish. The fastest and most powerful survive in the marine desert of the sea, playing a deadly game of hide-and-seek with their prey.

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: A look at the survival techniques of creatures who endure the harsh conditions of the Arctic and Antarctic. For six months a year, all is dark at the poles and the temperature drops to minus forty degrees Celsius. Some animals manage to survive the winter, while others are forced to migrate.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.sub-title: We Shall Fight Them In The Streets
programme.desc: When planning for the Nazi invasion of the UK the physical defence of London was considered crucial. A ring of steel and concrete was thrown up around the capital as well as utilising natural defences.

programme.title: Great Australian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his 1913 Bradshaws Guide, Michael Portillo crosses the south east of Australia from the seat of government in Canberra to the multiethnic heart of its second largest city, Melbourne. Floating above Canberra in a hot air balloon, Michael sees how Australias `Bush Capital was planned in the early 20th century.

programme.title: Locomotion: Dan Snows History of Railways
programme.desc: A nation had built the railways and now those railways would build a nation, influencing working conditions for its employees, proving a valuable export across the globe and even changing warfare. Yet the story of railways up until the beginning of the Second World War concerned who they really belonged to.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the flora and fauna of the diverse terrains of Earth, while also analysing how wildlife survives in extreme environments.

programme.title: A Perfect Planet
programme.desc: A look at how without volcanoes, there would be no life on Earth. Although destructive, magma from the planets molten core builds land, and mineral-rich ash from eruptions fertilises the surface.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will Trickett and Gus Gregory hunt for neglected cars they can fix and flip for a profit. Any losses incurred by their flipping come out of their own pockets.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are back, travelling Britain seeking items to fix up and flog on. They restore eight items including a pine blanket chest, a pair of battlefield telephones, and some gothic church windows.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: On the North Sea comradeship counts for everything. The pair of trawlers, Ocean Dawn and Sunrise, always work together and their skippers Ian Ritchie and John Stevenson look out for one another through thick and thin. This fishing trip will be their toughest yet as ferocious weather, poor fishing and problems with a new net bring unexpected pressures to this successful working relationship. Can they win through?

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Its been a week of appalling weather - and even worse catches - for the skippers of the pair of trawlers Sunrise and Ocean Dawn, but their trip from hell is about to get much worse, with a catastrophic engine failure for one of them and a dramatic mercy dash by the other. Meanwhile, Ocean Venture has a close encounter with a Spanish trawler which spirals unexpectedly into an international incident.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai, where she battles all odds, reunites with her family, and fights to get her mother her rightful place in the family while chasing her dreams.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Reet, a driven journalist, is trapped in an atta-satta marriage. Battling family secrets and societal norms, she fights for justice and love while navigating her marital life.

programme.title: Jawan
programme.desc: A man is driven by a personal vendetta to rectify the wrongs in society, while keeping a promise made years ago. He comes up against a monstrous outlaw with no fear, whos caused extreme suffering to many.
